subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-30
subcodes.first_line: When we view the world of creation, we find that all living things may be classified under two aspects
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @race unity; racial issues, @unity in diversity, @love of God, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @unity; oneness of humanity, @man's distinction from the animal
